steps.title: Identify the shared claim about collaboration
steps.content:
Both texts emphasize that collaboration between tribal groups and government agencies improves conservation outcomes.

Text 1 asserts the collaborative approach “will likely improve the quality of any joint conservation projects,” and Text 2 states it “tends to lead to better conservation outcomes.” This shared positive effect of collaboration is where both authors agree.

steps.title: Match the authors' agreement to the choices
steps.content:
C directly states what both authors agree on: conservation projects benefit from tribal-government collaboration.

A overstates what collaboration can do (it helps address climate threats, not reduce temperatures), and B and D each rank or compare conservation targets without textual support.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
